name: Rental Billing - Daily Invoice Scheduler
Rental Contract - Generate Billing Schedule
script:
frequency_map = {
    "Monthly": 1,
    "Quarterly": 3,
    "Half-Yearly": 6,
    "Yearly": 12
}

months = frequency_map.get(doc.billing_frequency, 1)
start = doc.contract_start_date
end = doc.contract_end_date
period_start = start

while period_start < end:
    period_end = frappe.utils.add_months(period_start, months)
    period_end = frappe.utils.add_days(period_end, -1)
    
    if period_end > end:
        period_end = end
    
    if doc.billing_type == "Advance":
        scheduled_date = period_start
    else:
        scheduled_date = period_end
    
    bs = frappe.new_doc("Billing Schedule")
    bs.rental_contract = doc.name
    bs.customer = doc.customer
    bs.scheduled_date = scheduled_date
    bs.billing_amount = doc.billing_amount
    bs.period_start = period_start
    bs.period_end = period_end
    bs.status = "Pending"
    bs.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    
    period_start = frappe.utils.add_months(period_start, months)

name: PO Control - Billing Schedule PO Validation
PO Control - Create PO Control
script:
if not doc.po_required or not doc.po_number:
    pass
else:
    existing = frappe.get_all(
        "PO Control",
        filters={"po_number": doc.po_number, "rental_contract": doc.name},
        fields=["name"]
    )
    if not existing:
        po_control = frappe.new_doc("PO Control")
        po_control.po_number = doc.po_number
        po_control.customer = doc.customer
        po_control.rental_contract = doc.name
        po_control.po_total_value = doc.po_total_value
        po_control.po_expiry_date = doc.contract_end_date
        po_control.amount_utilised = 0
        po_control.remaining_balance = doc.po_total_value
        po_control.utilisation = 0
        po_control.status = "Active"
        po_control.alert_sent_80 = 0
        po_control.alert_sent_90 = 0
        po_control.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

name: PO Control - Update PO Balance
PO Control - Daily Expiry Check
script:
expired_pos = frappe.get_all(
    "PO Control",
    filters={"status": "Active", "po_expiry_date": ["<", frappe.utils.nowdate()]},
    fields=["name", "po_number", "rental_contract"]
)
for po in expired_pos:
    frappe.db.set_value("PO Control", po["name"], "status", "Expired")
    pending_schedules = frappe.get_all(
        "Billing Schedule",
        filters={"rental_contract": po["rental_contract"], "status": "Pending"},
        fields=["name"]
    )
    for schedule in pending_schedules:
        frappe.db.set_value("Billing Schedule", schedule["name"], "status", "Cancelled")
    frappe.msgprint(
        f"PO {po['po_number']} has expired. {len(pending_schedules)} pending billing schedule(s) cancelled.",
        indicator="red", alert=True
    )

name: Rental Contract - Before Cancel
script:
submitted_invoices = frappe.get_all("Sales Invoice", filters={"custom_rental_contract": doc.name, "docstatus": 1}, fields=["name"])
if submitted_invoices:
    invoice_list = ", ".join([inv["name"] for inv in submitted_invoices])
    frappe.throw(f"Cannot cancel. Submitted invoices exist: {invoice_list}. Please cancel them first.")

name: Rental Contract - Before Save Validation
Rental Contract - On Submit
script:
frappe.db.set_value("Rental Contract", doc.name, "status", "Active")

if doc.po_required and not doc.po_number:
    frappe.db.set_value("Rental Contract", doc.name, "status", "Pending Approval")
    frappe.msgprint(
        "No PO linked. Contract moved to Pending Approval.",
        indicator="orange",
        alert=True
    )
